info.general: <backpack> is a maroon-colored backpack with a front zippered pocket and decorative pins.
info.distinct features: three decorative pins on the front pocket, a rectangular brand label

info.general: <backpack_dog> is a child's backpack designed to resemble a dog's face.
info.color: beige with brown, pink, and blue accents
info.distinct features: embroidered dog face with ears, nose, smiling mouth, and pink tongue

info.general: <bear_plushie> is a brown plush teddy bear with a white snout and paws, wearing a blue bow on its head and a 'Get Well' patch on its chest.
info.distinct features: blue bow on head, white snout and paws, 'Get Well' patch on chest

info.general: <berry_bowl> is a white ceramic bowl filled with blueberries.
info.shape: cylindrical with a slightly flared rim
info.pattern: grid pattern with thin black lines
info.distinct features: gold cursive text on the side

info.general: <can> is a cylindrical aluminum beverage can with a blue label featuring a whale and wave illustration.
info.pattern: illustration of a whale with a yellow wave inside its body
info.brand/text: TRANSATLANTIC IPA, 横越大西洋, 印度淡色艾尔啤酒, 6.5%, BATCH #3, 330ml, CRAFTS, INDEPENDENT CRAFT
info.distinct features: label design with a stylized whale and wave, bilingual text in English and Chinese

info.general: <candle> is a cylindrical container with a wooden lid and a wick protruding from the center.
info.distinct features: wooden lid with a central wick protrusion

info.general: <cat> is a domestic feline with a short, smooth coat and distinct facial markings.
info.coat_and_color: short, smooth, light brown with darker brown stripes
info.facial_features: yellow eyes, pointed ears, and a slightly rounded snout
info.distinctive_markings: white patch on the chest, white paws

info.general: <cat2> is a sleek gray cat with vivid green eyes and pointed ears.
info.coat_and_color: short, dense, and uniformly gray fur
info.facial_features: large, round green eyes, small triangular ears, and a short snout

info.general: <clock> is a yellow analog alarm clock with a white face and black numerals.
info.distinct features: has two bells on top and a large yellow number '3' partially visible on the face.

info.general: <colorful_sneaker> is a low-top sneaker with a multi-colored, patchwork design.
info.shape: low-top with a rounded toe and a thick platform sole
info.color: beige, mint green, lavender, and yellow
info.distinct features: color-blocked panels, yellow stripe on the side, cut-out design around the laces

info.general: <dog> is a fluffy, medium-sized canine with a predominantly white and tan coat.
info.coat_and_color: long, fluffy, and soft with white and tan primary colors
info.facial_features: dark eyes, erect ears, and a black nose
info.distinctive_markings: white markings on the face, chest, and paws

info.general: <dog2> is a fluffy, golden-brown dog with a thick, textured coat and a broad, flat face.
info.coat_and_color: long, dense, and fluffy with a primary golden-brown color
info.facial_features: dark eyes, small erect ears, and a black muzzle with a slightly upturned mouth

info.general: <dog3> is a small, fluffy white dog with curly fur and dark eyes.
info.facial_features: dark brown eyes, floppy ears, black nose

info.general: <dog5> is a long-haired dog with a reddish-brown coat and floppy ears.
info.facial_features: large, dark eyes, long snout, floppy ears

info.general: <dog6> is a small dog with large ears and a white and tan coat.
info.facial_features: large dark eyes, large upright ears, black nose
info.distinctive_markings: white blaze on the face, white chest and paws

info.general: <dog7> is a medium to large-sized dog with a fluffy, golden-brown coat.
info.species_and_breed: Dog, Nova Scotia Duck Tolling Retriever
info.facial_features: large, floppy ears, dark eyes, and a pink nose

info.general: <dog8> is a fluffy dog with a predominantly white and gray coat.
info.facial_features: dark eyes, erect ears, black nose
info.distinctive_markings: gray patches on the head and back, white muzzle and chest

info.general: <duck_toy> is a classic yellow rubber duck with an orange beak and black eyes.
info.shape: rounded, with a bulbous body, a curved neck, and a slightly raised back
info.color: yellow with an orange beak and black eyes
info.distinct features: simple design with two black circular eyes and a bright orange beak

info.general: <fancy_boot> is a beige ankle boot with fringe detailing along the side.
info.distinct features: fringe decoration along the outer side of the boot

info.general: <grey_sloth_plushie> is a plush toy sloth with a soft, furry texture.
info.shape: rounded body with long limbs and a small head
info.distinct features: white facial markings, brown nose, and white claws

info.general: <monster_toy> is a red plush toy with large eyes and a yellow textured belly.
info.distinct features: large round eyes, black stitched mouth with white teeth, yellow textured belly, red tail with white tips

info.general: <pink_sunglasses> is a pair of aviator-style sunglasses with a rose gold frame and dark gradient lenses.
info.distinct features: beaded edge detailing on the frame

info.general: <poop_emoji> is a brown, spiral-shaped figurine with large white-rimmed eyes and a smiling mouth.
info.distinct features: large white-rimmed eyes, smiling mouth, small hole at the top

info.general: <rc_car> is a colorful toy race car with a driver figure inside.
info.shape: streamlined race car with a cockpit and antenna
info.color: red, yellow, green, blue, orange, black, white
info.brand/text: number '1' on the driver's vest and on the side of the car
info.distinct features: antenna with blue tip, driver figure wearing helmet and blue vest with number '1', yellow interior, orange headlights, green bumper

info.general: <red_cartoon> is a small, round, red cartoon creature with two small horns and simple facial features.
info.coat_and_color: solid red, smooth texture, no fur
info.facial_features: large white eyes with black pupils, small black mouth
info.distinctive_markings: two small red horns on top of the head

info.general: <robot_toy> is a small, white and black robotic toy with blue glowing accents and wheels.
info.shape: humanoid with rounded head, torso, arms, and legs, mounted on a wheeled base
info.distinct features: blue glowing wheels and chest panel, black hands and eyes

info.general: <shiny_sneaker> is a single sneaker with a holographic upper and thick white sole.
info.shape: low-top athletic shoe with a chunky sole
info.distinct features: holographic upper, thick white platform sole with textured tread

info.general: <teapot> is a small, rounded ceramic vessel with a lid, spout, and handle.
info.shape: rounded body with a domed lid, curved spout, and C-shaped handle
info.distinct features: lid with a small knob on top, smooth and unadorned surface

info.general: <vase> is a tall, slender vase with a flared rim and a textured red surface.
info.shape: tall and slender with a flared rim
info.pattern: textured surface with a mottled appearance
info.distinct features: has a flared rim and a textured, mottled red surface

info.general: <wolf_plushie> is a plush toy resembling a husky with gray and white fur.
info.distinct features: blue eyes, black nose, red collar
